headline: PayPal Resets Growth Story With DOJ Deal, Fee Waivers And Crypto Shift
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) has settled a Department of Justice investigation into its prior race-based investment program. The company is launching a new fee-waiver initiative, covering processing fees on $1b of small business transactions. PayPal is also restructuring its operations into three segments, including a dedicated crypto and stablecoin division to support the global rollout of PYUSD. These updates arrive at a challenging time for NasdaqGS:PYPL, with the stock trading at...
